# DJ Misha — San Diego DJ for Hire

## Site Name
DJ Misha / San Diego DJ for Party Events Weddings DJs spinning House Music Dance EDM

## Site URL
https://djmisha.com

## Description
DJ Misha is a San Diego DJ for hire, specializing in weddings, parties, and corporate events, with expertise in EDM, house, and dance music. Mobile DJ services include sound systems and professional DJ gear.

## Primary Services
- DJ + Saxophone Duo (DJ Misha and Jason Whitmore on Saxophone)
- Wedding DJ in San Diego
- Destination Wedding DJ
- Corporate Event DJ in San Diego
- Party & Birthday DJ in San Diego

## Contact Information
- Phone: (619) 786-2664
- Email: Available via contact form at https://djmisha.com/contact/
- Address: 4640 Cass Street #9553, San Diego, CA 92109

## Service Area
San Diego, California and surrounding areas. Travel and destination events available.

## Price Range
Contact for pricing. Rates vary depending on date, time, location, equipment required, number of people attending, and client expectations.
